name: CoreClaw Google Maps Leads Complete Global

parameters.content:
## CoreClaw Google Maps Leads - Complete Global

1. Install `n8n-nodes-coreclaw`.
2. Create a CoreClaw API credential.
3. Select that credential on every CoreClaw node after import.
4. Edit only keyword, base_location, max_results, optional review switches, then execute.

Flow: search Google Maps scraper -> get details/version/schema -> generate config -> run -> live poll until terminal status -> results -> CSV/JSON exports -> logs.

No API key, local path, or proxy setting is stored in this workflow.
